calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jul-07-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Judge: Herbert Donalson, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Lavon Granger
Petitioner, Jennifer Maureen Morris present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to Jared Micah Morris, Gender is changed from Female to Male.
Decree signed in open court.
